I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code and then apply the migration fix.

Now let me reason through the fix:

1. **Migration rule**: `PageSectionVariants.light` is no longer valid. The value `"light"` needs to be replaced with `"default"` (which is the closest semantic match for a light/standard page section background).

2. **Three occurrences**: Lines 23, 31, and 34 all use `PageSectionVariants.light`.

3. **After the change**: Since all three usages of `PageSectionVariants` are being changed to use the string `"default"` directly, the `PageSectionVariants` import will no longer be referenced and should be removed.

4. **Cleanup**: Remove `PageSectionVariants` from the import on line 4.

Let me apply the changes:

arguments.after: import { Grid, GridItem, PageSection, Title } from '@patternfly/react-core';
arguments.before: import { Grid, GridItem, PageSection, PageSectionVariants, Title } from '@patternfly/react-core';

arguments.after:
<PageSection variant="default">
        <Title headingLevel="h2">{t('{{kind}} details', { kind: networkPolicy.kind })}</Title>
        <Grid span={6}>
          <GridItem>
            <NetworkPolicyDetailsMetadata networkPolicy={networkPolicy} />
          </GridItem>
        </Grid>
      </PageSection>
      <PageSection variant="default">
        <NetworkPolicyDetailsIngress networkPolicy={networkPolicy} />
      </PageSection>
      <PageSection variant="default">
        <NetworkPolicyDetailsEgress networkPolicy={networkPolicy} />
      </PageSection>
arguments.before:
<PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light}>
        <Title headingLevel="h2">{t('{{kind}} details', { kind: networkPolicy.kind })}</Title>
        <Grid span={6}>
          <GridItem>
            <NetworkPolicyDetailsMetadata networkPolicy={networkPolicy} />
          </GridItem>
        </Grid>
      </PageSection>
      <PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light}>
        <NetworkPolicyDetailsIngress networkPolicy={networkPolicy} />
      </PageSection>
      <PageSection variant={PageSectionVariants.light}>
        <NetworkPolicyDetailsEgress networkPolicy={networkPolicy} />
      </PageSection>

content.text: Let me verify the final file:

The file looks correct.

## Changes Applied

1. **Lines 23, 31, 34**: Replaced `variant={PageSectionVariants.light}` with `variant="default"` on all three `<PageSection>` instances. The value `"default"` is the appropriate replacement for `"light"` as it represents the standard/light background appearance.

2. **Line 4 (import cleanup)**: Removed `PageSectionVariants` from the `@patternfly/react-core` import since it is no longer referenced anywhere in the file.
